task_description: Create a basic Lambda function skeleton (SleepAudioProcessor) and integrate it into the Step Functions state machine using LambdaInvoke. Follow strict TDD approach: write failing tests first, then implement. The Lambda serves as a placeholder for audio processing/metadata enrichment. Grant least-privilege IAM permissions. Update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 37 tests pass (6 new Lambda/state-machine tests + 31 existing with 2 updated for new state wiring). CDK synth succeeds. Tests exercise actual synthesized CloudFormation template properties and verify Lambda resource, environment variables, LambdaInvoke task presence, IAM permissions (lambda:InvokeFunction, DynamoDB read/write), state ordering, and error handling.
